request.system:
You are a regulatory analyst. Given a prediction-market contract and a single regulatory news record, decide if this record is relevant to whether the contract resolves YES or NO. Score relevance 0-10 (0 = off-topic, 10 = directly determinative). Return JSON matching the schema. one_line_why should be ≤160 chars and explain how this record moves resolution probability.

Direction: judge whether this event makes the contract MORE likely to resolve YES (= bullish), LESS likely to resolve YES (= bearish), or has no directional effect (= neutral). IMPORTANT: direction is always relative to YES resolution. If your one_line_why says the event 'increases odds' or 'raises probability', direction MUST be bullish. If it says 'decreases odds' or 'lowers probability', direction MUST be bearish. Do not contradict yourself.

Magnitude: high = materially changes probability, medium = notable but not decisive, low = incremental signal.

Timeline shift: does this event suggest resolution will come sooner or later than expected, or no change (none)?
request.user:
Contract title: Will the Federal Reserve Cut rates by 25bps at their January 2028 meeting?
Resolution criteria: If the Federal Reserve does a Cut of 25bps on January 26, 2028, then the market resolves to Yes.
Conditions:
  A: FOMC 25 bps cut on Jan 26, 2028 — On Jan 26, 2028, the FOMC announces an exact 25 bp reduction in the federal funds rate target range (both bounds down 0.25 pp vs prior), per official Federal Reserve release.
Settlement entities: ['Federal Open Market Committee', 'Federal Reserve System', 'Federal Reserve Board of Governors', 'Jerome Powell', 'Department of the Treasury', 'Bureau of Labor Statistics']

Record title: Transnational Criminal Organizations Designations; Burma-related Designations; Global Magnitsky Designations; Cyber-related Designations
Record date: 2025-09-08
Record regulator: Office of Foreign Assets Control
Record topic: United States Department of the Treasury
Record entities: ['CHIT LIN MYING CO., LTD.', 'CHIT LINN MYAING MINING AND INDUSTRY COMPANY LIMITED', 'CHIT LINN MYAING TOYOTA COMPANY LIMITED', 'HH BANK CAMBODIA PLC', 'HENG HE BAVET PROPERTY CO LTD', 'K B HOTEL CO LTD', 'K B X INVESTMENT CO LTD', 'M D S HENG HE INVESTMENT CO LTD', 'MYANMAR YATAI INTERNATIONAL HOLDING GROUP CO., LTD.', 'Office of Foreign Assets Control', 'SHWE MYINT THAUNG YINN INDUSTRY AND MANUFACTURING COMPANY LIMITED', 'T C CAPITAL CO LTD', 'YATAI INTERNATIONAL HOLDING GROUP LIMITED']

response.one_line_why: OFAC designations of Burma-related entities (Sep 2025) are unrelated to FOMC's January 26, 2028 25bp decision and don't materially affect Fed policy odds.
